channel.title: Serenity News Briefing
channel.description: Curated news briefings by Serenity — Iran/war, AI/ML, fintech, NYC politics.

item.title: Briefing: March 4 — Iran Death Toll Passes 1,000; US KIA Identified; Markets Tumble Day 3
item.description:
Iran / Middle East

Civilian death toll in Iran passes 1,000 as US-Israeli strikes continue. UK charters evacuation flight from Oman. Funerals held for students/staff killed in Minab school strike. All 6 US soldiers killed (drone strike in Kuwait) now identified — ages 20-42. Gulf states weigh response after retaliatory Iranian strikes: "All red lines crossed." European allies bolster Cyprus after drones target RAF Akrotiri (suspected Hezbollah). Strait of Hormuz standoff: Iran threatens to "set fire" to ships; Trump pledges Navy protection.

Markets

Asia stocks tumble for third consecutive day. Oil surges as markets track Iran war. Trump frames Navy deployment as energy supply protection.

AI/Tech

TikTok refuses end-to-end encryption for DMs, citing user safety — breaking with WhatsApp/Messenger. OpenAI military deal draws continued backlash. Anthropic also facing controversy.

US Politics

Kristi Noem grilled at Senate hearing — bipartisan criticism of DHS leadership. Commerce Secretary to testify on Epstein ties.

NYC/Mamdani

No coverage found.

Sources: BBC News. Collected 2026-03-04.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 Late — 4+ US Troops Killed in Kuwait; Iran Death Toll Rising
item.description:
At least 4 US troops killed in drone strike on military base in Kuwait — first American combat deaths in the Iran conflict. Gulf state targets hit by Iranian retaliatory strikes. Civilian toll in Iran continues climbing past 787. Strait of Hormuz threats escalating. European allies reinforcing positions.

Sources: BBC News.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 PM — Iran Escalation (787 Dead), US KIA, OpenAI Military Deal Backlash
item.description:
Iran civilian death toll reaches 787 with strikes ongoing. First US soldiers killed in conflict. OpenAI military deal draws backlash. Claude tops App Store. Markets rattled by Middle East uncertainty.

Sources: BBC News.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 AM — US-Israel Strikes on Iran Begin, Tech/AI Roundup
item.description:
US and Israel launch coordinated strikes on Iran. First reports of casualties emerging. AI and tech sector updates. Market snapshot as conflict begins.

Sources: BBC News.
